cloudformation.moduledefaultversion.Arn.Docs: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the module version to set as the default version.  Conditional: You must specify either `Arn`, or `ModuleName` and `VersionId`.

cloudformation.moduledefaultversion.Modu.Docs: The name of the module.  Conditional: You must specify either `Arn`, or `ModuleName` and `VersionId`.

cloudformation.moduledefaultversion.Vers.Docs: The ID for the specific version of the module.  Conditional: You must specify either `Arn`, or `ModuleName` and `VersionId`.
